_comment: Day 1 assembly. Base = selfie_combined_tight.mp4 (~60.1s post-tighten-pass-3). After assembly, 1.08× speedup applied.

inserts._comment: IG repost: 'Someone reposted… 2,000 comments'. Cumulative kept before window 2 = 4.26. 'Someone' word at 8.61 in original, offset within window 2 = 8.61-5.20 = 3.41. Tightened position = 4.26 + 3.41 = 7.67
Cowork screen: 'Step one wasn't even recorded… plan the whole 30 days'. Cumulative kept before window 8 = 4.26 + 12.70 + 2.90 + 6.59 + 5.88 + 2.85 + 4.30 = 39.48
Agentic b-roll: 6.42s · 3 cuts (writing/editing/publishing). Starts 6.7s into window 8 = 39.48 + 6.7 = 46.18
